title: Time with Friends in Missoula
summary:
I left Colin in Leavenworth and started my first solo road trip in the van to Missoula. I left the van and carpooled up to Hungry Horse Reservoir with a friend. I wanted to surprise my friend for her 30th birthday, and while I am not sure she was actually surprised, it was a fun weekend reuniting with all my Missoula people and celebrating Maddy's birthday, in Jersey shore camping style.

We had decided to come back to Missoula around this time because our renters were moving out. We were hoping to have a couple of weeks to spend in our house, relaxing and getting ready for the next tenants; however, it turned out we only got two nights in our house before the new renters moved in. We still decided to stay for a couple of weeks to catch up with friends and enjoy summer in Missoula. Other than cleaning up the house, we spent the days swimming in the river, climbing in Lolo, visiting our favorite restaurants, hiking our familiar trails and being with friends. Although it was weird to be in Missoula without a home, we spent the nights parked outside of a friend's house, who was nice enough to allow us to use their facilities and hang out in their house. At the end of two weeks, we were sad to say goodbye to everyone but excited to get back on the road!

-Helen
